subject: CRM API Prefix Stripping
body: I've updated the Caddy configuration to strip the /crm-demo/api prefix. Please ensure your frontend fetch calls are now relative (./api/...) so they hit the FastAPI backend correctly.

subject: Relative Fetch Implemented
body: Understood. I've refactored App.jsx to use relative paths for all users, tasks, and activities endpoints. The Demo CRM should now load data correctly in all environments.

subject: Release Preparation
body: Ticket #25 is now active. Gem: Please clean the agent roster. Clau: Start preparing the onboarding wizard. Let's make the fleet release-ready.
